title: Kilrock Big K Multi-Purpose Descaler 400ml (5 Doses) - Limescale Descaling for Kettles, Shower Heads & Coffee Machines - Biodegradable and Phosphate Free - 100% Limecale Removal
features: STRONGEST DESCALER ON THE MARKET: Kilrock's multi-purpose descaler's powerful formula cuts through the toughest limescale from your kettle, shower head, toilet bowl, iron, coffee machine and more. The formula is biodegradable and phosphate free.
SPARKLING TOILETS, KETTLES, SHOWERHEADS, TAPS AND MORE: Effectively removes all traces of limescale build up removing unsightly stains and ensuring optimal performance for your appliances.
CONTAINS 5 GENEROUS DOSES PER BOTTLE: Can be opened, resealed and used throughout your home for multi purpose and multi use.
EASY TO USE: Simply pour the measured dose into your appliance following the instructions on the bottle. Leave, then rinse. We recommend wearing rubber gloves.
PROLONG YOUR APPLIANCES' LIFESPAN: Rapid action, destroys limescale in minutes allowing you to save electricity, improve performance and prolong your machine's lifespan.
description: From the manufacturer BEFORE: KETTLE AFTER: KETTLE BEFORE: TOILET AFTER: TOILET
